description: Alchemical recipes describing methods of preparation of metals (copper, sulphur), how to burn them, wash them, dry them and grind them. Mentions a crucible, a glass furnace (most likely a furnace for the preparation of glass) and qulquṭār (a reddish oxide of iron). (Information from CUDL; see also Goitein's index card.)
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
